snippet.title: They discharged me from the hospital - Part 2
snippet.description:
Thank you for sending me all your overwhelming love and support. While I was miserable, one of the few things that cracked a smile on my face was interacting with you all through this vlog. Thank you for getting my mind off of things. 
Thank you for giving me the strength to carry on, no matter what, through the kind words you expressed in the comments. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for always having my back. I don’t think I can ever hope to repay you. 

My Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/priyankapdeshpande/?hl=en

#ThankYouMakkale #StaySafe #IamBack

snippet.title: மே 6 முதல் அரசு அறிவித்த 20 முக்கிய கட்டுப்பாடுகள் | Tamil Nadu Extends Lockdown Till May 20
snippet.description:
மே 6 முதல் அரசு அறிவித்த 20 முக்கிய கட்டுப்பாடுகள் | Tamil Nadu Extends Lockdown Till May 20
#LockdownExtends #TNLockdown #SathiyamNews

மே 6 முதல் மளிகை, காய்கறிக் கடைகள் நண்பகல் 12 மணி வரை மட்டுமே இயங்க அனுமதி: தமிழக அரசு அறிவிப்பு
நோய்த்தொற்று அறிகுறிகள் தென்பட்டவுடன், பொதுமக்கள் உடனே அருகிலுள்ள மருத்துவமனைகளை நாடி மருத்துவ ஆலோசனை / சிகிச்சை பெற வேண்டும். பொதுமக்கள் அரசின் முயற்சிகளுக்கு முழு ஒத்துழைப்பு நல்க வேண்டுமென அரசு கேட்டுக் கொள்கிறது”.

To Know the Live and Breaking news at the earliest on your convenience we are here to serve you. #SathiyamNews

Sathiyam Live News is streaming for 24x7 that tends to bring you all the updates on Latest News and Breaking News happening in and out of Tamil Nadu. All new International News, Kollywood Updates, Cinema News and Trending World News, Sports News, Economic News and Business News do hit the red subscribe button and follow us.  
Sathiyam TV is 24 X 7 Tamil news & current affairs channel headquartered at Royapuram in Chennai and is run by Sathiyam Media Vision Pvt Ltd. 

You Can also follow us @
Facebook: https://www.fb.com/SathiyamNEWS 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/SathiyamNEWS
Website: https://www.sathiyam.tv
Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/sathiyamtv/

About Sathiyam News :
Sathiyam also offers news based investigative shows such as Urakka Solvoem, Kuttram Kuttramae, discussion shows such as Sathiyam Saathiyamae, Kelvi Kanaigal & Adaiyaalam, public interest shows such as Pasumarathaani, Ivar Yaar, Uzhavan & Urimai Kural, satirical shows such as Mic Mayaandi and history based shows such as Varalaattril Indru & Varalaaru Pesukirathu.
We as a company have passion to reach out to the Tamil speaking population world over with the honest and responsible presentation of news and current affairs that reflects the true spirit of journalism and reported with authenticity, clarity and definitive conviction. We believe that a decision made by individuals in the society who have access to information that is truthful and unbiased has the potential to impact and change the society at large. All the broadcasts of Sathiyam Television will express news in a manner that is true, integral, understandable and devoid of sensationalism or slander of any kind. All broadcasts of Sathiyam Television have a singular focus of arming the viewer with the truth that would empower them to make a decision by themselves. This change we believe in turn will prepare our Nation to face the reality of truth and motivate its citizens to operate based on their individual decision.

Sathiyam is aiming to become a strong and competitive channel in the GEC space of Tamil Television scenario. Sathiyam’s biggest strength is its people. The channel has some of the best talent on its rolls. A clear vision backed by the best brains gives Sathiyam a clear cut edge in the crowded Tamil TV landscape.

As for DTH, Sathiyam is available in all leading DTH & other OTT  platforms  Sathiyam TV is also available for viewership in the Bangalore, Mysore, Hubli & Dharwad areas of Karnataka and in Mumbai & Kolkata through terrestrial means, apart from a 24X7 web streaming at www.sathiyam.tv

Sathiyam has also ventured into offering media based vocational education and training through its educational arm, Sathiyam Academy. Apart from these, Sathiyam runs a matrimonial service by the name MY BEST COMPANION.

snippet.title: Detox & Relax Through Breath | Day 4 of 10 Days Breath And Meditation Journey With Gurudev
snippet.description:
Breathing is a tool with which we can access the switchboard of our nervous system, which controls our involuntary and voluntary nervous systems, let us learn to detox and relax through breath.

Join the 10 Day Breath and Meditation Journey on http://aoliv.in/10days​

Maximize happiness, health & immunity. Cut down stress, anxiety, and depression! Learn the powerful breathing technique Sudarshan Kriya, along with Pranayama, Yoga, Meditation and Practical Tips for everyday living in the online Meditation and Breath workshop (The Art of Living Happiness Program).

 Register now 👉🏽 https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

About Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar is a world-renowned humanitarian, spiritual leader, and an ambassador of peace and human values. Through his life and work, Gurudev has inspired millions around the world with a vision of a stress-free and violence-free world.
Gurudev founded The Art of Living, a non-profit organization that is engaged in stress-management and service initiatives. The programs designed by Gurudev empower people with techniques and tools to live a deeper and blissful life.

#GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving #BreathHeals

hi.title: सांस के जरिए डिटॉक्स और रिलैक्स | गुरुदेव के साथ 10 दिन की सांस और ध्यान यात्रा के दिन 4
hi.description:
श्वास एक उपकरण है जिसके साथ हम अपने तंत्रिका तंत्र के स्विचबोर्ड तक पहुंच सकते हैं, जो हमारे अनैच्छिक और स्वैच्छिक तंत्रिका तंत्र को नियंत्रित करता है, आइए हम सांस के माध्यम से डिटॉक्स करना और आराम करना सीखते हैं।

 Http://aoliv.in/10days पर 10 दिवसीय सांस और ध्यान यात्रा में शामिल हों

 खुशी, स्वास्थ्य और प्रतिरक्षा को अधिकतम करें। तनाव, चिंता और अवसाद में कटौती करें! ऑनलाइन मेडिटेशन और ब्रीथ वर्कशॉप (द आर्ट ऑफ लिविंग हैप्पीनेस प्रोग्राम) में रोजमर्रा की जिंदगी के लिए प्राणायाम, योग, ध्यान और व्यावहारिक टिप्स के साथ शक्तिशाली श्वास तकनीक सुदर्शन क्रिया सीखें।

 अब रजिस्टर करें a https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर के बारे में

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर विश्व प्रसिद्ध मानवतावादी, आध्यात्मिक नेता और शांति और मानवीय मूल्यों के राजदूत हैं। अपने जीवन और कार्य के माध्यम से, गुरुदेव ने दुनिया भर में लाखों लोगों को एक तनाव-मुक्त और हिंसा-मुक्त दुनिया की दृष्टि से प्रेरित किया।
 गुरुदेव ने द आर्ट ऑफ लिविंग की स्थापना की, जो एक गैर-लाभकारी संगठन है जो तनाव-प्रबंधन और सेवा की पहल में लगा हुआ है। गुरुदेव द्वारा डिजाइन किए गए कार्यक्रम लोगों को तकनीकों और उपकरणों के साथ एक गहन और आनंदित जीवन जीने के लिए सशक्त बनाते हैं।

 # गुरुदेव श्रीश्री रविशंकर

pt.title: Desintoxique e relaxe com a respiração | Dia 4 de 10 dias de jornada de respiração e meditação
pt.description:
A respiração é uma ferramenta com a qual podemos acessar o painel de controle do nosso sistema nervoso, que controla o nosso sistema nervoso involuntário e voluntário, vamos aprender a desintoxicar e relaxar através da respiração.

 Junte-se à Jornada de 10 dias de respiração e meditação em http://aoliv.in/10days

 Maximize a felicidade, saúde e imunidade. Reduza o estresse, a ansiedade e a depressão! Aprenda a poderosa técnica de respiração Sudarshan Kriya, junto com Pranayama, Yoga, Meditação e Dicas Práticas para a vida cotidiana no workshop online de Meditação e Respiração (Programa A Arte de Viver Felicidade).

 Cadastre-se agora 👉🏽 https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

 Sobre Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

 Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar é um líder espiritual humanitário de renome mundial e um embaixador da paz e dos valores humanos. Ao longo de sua vida e trabalho, Gurudev inspirou milhões ao redor do mundo com uma visão de um mundo sem estresse e sem violência.
 Gurudev fundou The Art of Living, uma organização sem fins lucrativos que está envolvida em iniciativas de gerenciamento de estresse e serviços. Os programas desenvolvidos por Gurudev capacitam as pessoas com técnicas e ferramentas para viver uma vida mais profunda e feliz.

 #GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving #BreathHeals

ar.title: التخلص من السموم والاسترخاء عن طريق التنفس | اليوم الرابع من عشرة أيام رحلة التنفس والتأمل مع جورودي
ar.description:
التنفس هو أداة يمكننا من خلالها الوصول إلى لوحة مفاتيح نظامنا العصبي ، والتي تتحكم في أنظمتنا العصبية اللاإرادية والطوعية ، فلنتعلم التخلص من السموم والاسترخاء عن طريق التنفس.

 انضم إلى رحلة التنفس والتأمل لمدة 10 أيام على http://aoliv.in/10days

 تعظيم السعادة والصحة والمناعة. قلل من التوتر والقلق والاكتئاب! تعلم تقنية التنفس القوية Sudarshan Kriya ، جنبًا إلى جنب مع Pranayama واليوجا والتأمل والنصائح العملية للحياة اليومية في ورشة عمل التأمل والنفس عبر الإنترنت (برنامج Art of Living Happiness Program).

 سجل الآن 👉🏽 https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

 حول جوروديف سري سري رافي شانكار

 غوروديف سري سري رافي شانكار هو زعيم روحي إنساني مشهور عالميًا وسفير السلام والقيم الإنسانية. من خلال حياته وعمله ، ألهم Gurudev الملايين حول العالم برؤية لعالم خالٍ من التوتر والعنف.
 أسس جوروديف The Art of Living ، وهي منظمة غير ربحية تشارك في إدارة الإجهاد ومبادرات الخدمة. تعمل البرامج التي صممها Gurudev على تمكين الأشخاص من خلال التقنيات والأدوات ليعيشوا حياة أعمق وأكثر سعادة.

 # صباح_الخير Si

es.title: Desintoxicación y relajación a través de la respiración | Día 4
es.description:
La respiración es una herramienta con la que podemos acceder a la centralita de nuestro sistema nervioso, que controla nuestro sistema nervioso involuntario y voluntario, nos permite aprender a desintoxicarnos y relajarnos a través de la respiración.

 Únase al viaje de 10 días de respiración y meditación en http://aoliv.in/10days

 Maximice la felicidad, la salud y la inmunidad. ¡Reduzca el estrés, la ansiedad y la depresión! Aprenda la poderosa técnica de respiración Sudarshan Kriya, junto con Pranayama, Yoga, Meditación y Consejos prácticos para la vida diaria en el taller en línea Meditación y respiración (Programa El arte de vivir la felicidad).

 Regístrese ahora 👉🏽 https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

 Acerca de Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

 Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar es un líder espiritual y humanitario de renombre mundial y un embajador de la paz y los valores humanos. A través de su vida y obra, Gurudev ha inspirado a millones de personas en todo el mundo con una visión de un mundo libre de estrés y sin violencia.
 Gurudev fundó The Art of Living, una organización sin fines de lucro que se dedica a iniciativas de servicio y manejo del estrés. Los programas diseñados por Gurudev empoderan a las personas con técnicas y herramientas para vivir una vida más profunda y feliz.

 #GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving #BreathHeals

snippet.title: I got admitted to the hospital - Part 1
snippet.description:
Makkale.. I was not feeling well and got admitted to the hospital. The whole hospital scene was really depressing. Vlogging from the hospital bed and staying positive helped me recover faster 😛 A positive attitude can recreate your reality. 

The times are tough, everyone is in some version of covid crises directly or indirectly. Just stick around and stay positive. #ThisTooShallPass #StayStrong #StaySafe

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/priyankapdeshpande/?hl=en

snippet.title: Strengthen The Lungs | Day 3 of 10 Days Breath And Meditation Journey With Gurudev
snippet.description:
Strengthen The Lungs | Day 3 of 10 Days Breath And Meditation Journey With Gurudev

Sign up and receive updates of this journey via WhatsApp on http://aoliv.in/10days

We take thousands of breaths each day and inhale thousands of liters of air. But, if our body isn't optimized and we aren't breathing properly then the lungs aren't able to take in as many nutrients as they can. By learning the breathing exercises on the Breathing and Meditation challenge, you can give your respiratory system a much-needed boost to tackle the COVID-19 virus and any other ailments that might come your way.

The meditation led by Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar will further relax the mind and get rid of the anxiety and despair that we are going through on a daily basis.

Invigorate your body and mind by learning powerful processes on the Online Meditation and Breath Workshop: 👉🏽 https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

About Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar is a world-renowned humanitarian, spiritual leader, and an ambassador of peace and human values. Through his life and work, Gurudev has inspired millions around the world with a vision of a stress-free and violence-free world.
Gurudev founded The Art of Living, a non-profit organization that is engaged in stress-management and service initiatives. The programs designed by Gurudev empower people with techniques and tools to live a deeper and blissful life.

#GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving #BreathHeals

hi.title: फेफड़ों को मजबूत बनाना | गुरुदेव के साथ 10 दिन की सांस और ध्यान यात्रा के दिन 3
hi.description:
फेफड़ों को मजबूत बनाना | गुरुदेव के साथ 10 दिन की सांस और ध्यान यात्रा के दिन 3

 साइन अप करें और http://aoliv.in/10days पर व्हाट्सएप के माध्यम से इस यात्रा के अपडेट प्राप्त करें

 हम हर दिन हजारों सांसें लेते हैं और हजारों लीटर हवा अंदर लेते हैं। लेकिन, यदि हमारा शरीर अनुकूलित नहीं है और हम ठीक से सांस नहीं ले रहे हैं, तो फेफड़े उतने पोषक तत्वों को लेने में सक्षम नहीं हैं, जितना वे कर सकते हैं। श्वास और ध्यान चुनौती पर श्वास अभ्यास सीखकर, आप अपने श्वसन तंत्र को COVID-19 वायरस और किसी भी अन्य बीमारी से निपटने के लिए एक बहुत ही आवश्यक बढ़ावा दे सकते हैं जो आपके रास्ते में आ सकती है।

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर के नेतृत्व में किए गए ध्यान से मन को आराम मिलेगा और हम उस चिंता और निराशा से छुटकारा पाएंगे जो हम दैनिक आधार पर कर रहे हैं।

 ऑनलाइन मेडिटेशन और बर्थ वर्कशॉप पर शक्तिशाली प्रक्रियाएं सीखकर अपने शरीर और दिमाग को मजबूत करें:

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर के बारे में

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर विश्व प्रसिद्ध मानवतावादी, आध्यात्मिक नेता और शांति और मानवीय मूल्यों के राजदूत हैं। अपने जीवन और कार्य के माध्यम से, गुरुदेव ने दुनिया भर में लाखों लोगों को एक तनाव-मुक्त और हिंसा-मुक्त दुनिया की दृष्टि से प्रेरित किया।
 गुरुदेव ने द आर्ट ऑफ लिविंग की स्थापना की, जो एक गैर-लाभकारी संगठन है जो तनाव-प्रबंधन और सेवा की पहल में लगा हुआ है। गुरुदेव द्वारा डिजाइन किए गए कार्यक्रम लोगों को तकनीकों और उपकरणों के साथ एक गहन और आनंदित जीवन जीने के लिए सशक्त बनाते हैं।

 # गुरुदेव श्रीश्री रविशंकर

en.title: Strengthen The Lungs | Day 3 of 10 Days Breath And Meditation Journey With Gurudev
en.description:
Strengthen The Lungs | Day 3 of 10 Days Breath And Meditation Journey With Gurudev

Sign up and receive updates of this journey via WhatsApp on http://aoliv.in/10days

We take thousands of breaths each day and inhale thousands of liters of air. But, if our body isn't optimized and we aren't breathing properly then the lungs aren't able to take in as many nutrients as they can. By learning the breathing exercises on the Breathing and Meditation challenge, you can give your respiratory system a much-needed boost to tackle the COVID-19 virus and any other ailments that might come your way.

The meditation led by Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar will further relax the mind and get rid of the anxiety and despair that we are going through on a daily basis.

Invigorate your body and mind by learning powerful processes on the Online Meditation and Breath Workshop: 👉🏽 https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

About Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar is a world-renowned humanitarian, spiritual leader, and an ambassador of peace and human values. Through his life and work, Gurudev has inspired millions around the world with a vision of a stress-free and violence-free world.
Gurudev founded The Art of Living, a non-profit organization that is engaged in stress-management and service initiatives. The programs designed by Gurudev empower people with techniques and tools to live a deeper and blissful life.

#GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving #BreathHeals

pt.title: Fortaleça os pulmões | Dia 3 de 10 dias de jornada de respiração e meditação com Gurudev
pt.description:
Fortaleça os pulmões | Dia 3 de 10 dias de jornada de respiração e meditação com Gurudev

 Cadastre-se e receba as atualizações dessa viagem pelo WhatsApp em http://aoliv.in/10days

 Respiramos milhares por dia e inalamos milhares de litros de ar. Mas, se nosso corpo não estiver otimizado e não respirarmos corretamente, os pulmões não serão capazes de absorver tantos nutrientes quanto puderem. Ao aprender os exercícios de respiração do desafio Respiração e Meditação, você pode dar ao seu sistema respiratório um impulso muito necessário para combater o vírus COVID-19 e quaisquer outras doenças que possam surgir no seu caminho.

 A meditação liderada por Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar vai relaxar ainda mais a mente e se livrar da ansiedade e do desespero que vivemos diariamente.

 Revigore seu corpo e mente aprendendo processos poderosos no Workshop Online de Meditação e Respiração: 👉🏽 https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

 Sobre Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

 Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar é um líder espiritual humanitário de renome mundial e um embaixador da paz e dos valores humanos. Ao longo de sua vida e trabalho, Gurudev inspirou milhões ao redor do mundo com uma visão de um mundo sem estresse e sem violência.
 Gurudev fundou The Art of Living, uma organização sem fins lucrativos que está envolvida em iniciativas de gerenciamento de estresse e serviços. Os programas desenvolvidos por Gurudev capacitam as pessoas com técnicas e ferramentas para viver uma vida mais profunda e feliz.

 #GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving #BreathHeals

es.title: Fortalecer los pulmones | Día 3 de 10 días de viaje de respiración y meditación con Gurudev
es.description:
Fortalecer los pulmones | Día 3 de 10 días de viaje de respiración y meditación con Gurudev

 Regístrese y reciba actualizaciones de este viaje a través de WhatsApp en http://aoliv.in/10days

 Tomamos miles de respiraciones cada día e inhalamos miles de litros de aire. Pero, si nuestro cuerpo no está optimizado y no respiramos correctamente, los pulmones no pueden absorber tantos nutrientes como pueden. Al aprender los ejercicios de respiración del desafío de respiración y meditación, puede darle a su sistema respiratorio un impulso muy necesario para combatir el virus COVID-19 y cualquier otra dolencia que pueda surgir en su camino.

 La meditación dirigida por Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar relajará aún más la mente y eliminará la ansiedad y la desesperación que atravesamos a diario.

 Vigorice su cuerpo y mente aprendiendo procesos poderosos en el Taller en línea de meditación y respiración: 👉🏽 https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

 Acerca de Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

 Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar es un líder espiritual y humanitario de renombre mundial y un embajador de la paz y los valores humanos. A través de su vida y obra, Gurudev ha inspirado a millones de personas en todo el mundo con una visión de un mundo libre de estrés y sin violencia.
 Gurudev fundó The Art of Living, una organización sin fines de lucro que se dedica a iniciativas de servicio y manejo del estrés. Los programas diseñados por Gurudev empoderan a las personas con técnicas y herramientas para vivir una vida más profunda y feliz.

 #GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving #BreathHeals

ar.title: تقوية الرئتين | اليوم الثالث من عشرة أيام رحلة التنفس والتأمل مع جوروديف
ar.description:
تقوية الرئتين | اليوم الثالث من عشرة أيام رحلة التنفس والتأمل مع جوروديف

 قم بالتسجيل وتلقي تحديثات هذه الرحلة عبر WhatsApp على http://aoliv.in/10days

 نأخذ آلاف الأنفاس كل يوم ونستنشق آلاف اللترات من الهواء. ولكن ، إذا لم يتم تحسين أجسامنا ولم نتنفس بشكل صحيح ، فلن تتمكن الرئتان من تناول أكبر قدر ممكن من العناصر الغذائية. من خلال تعلم تمارين التنفس في تحدي التنفس والتأمل ، يمكنك إعطاء الجهاز التنفسي دفعة تشتد الحاجة إليها لمواجهة فيروس COVID-19 وأي أمراض أخرى قد تواجهك.

 إن التأمل الذي يقوده Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar سيزيد من استرخاء العقل والتخلص من القلق واليأس اللذين نمر بهما يوميًا.

 قم بتنشيط جسدك وعقلك من خلال تعلم عمليات قوية في ورشة عمل التأمل والتنفس عبر الإنترنت: 👉🏽 https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

 حول جوروديف سري سري رافي شانكار

 غوروديف سري سري رافي شانكار هو زعيم روحي إنساني مشهور عالميًا وسفير السلام والقيم الإنسانية. من خلال حياته وعمله ، ألهم Gurudev الملايين حول العالم برؤية لعالم خالٍ من التوتر والعنف.
 أسس جوروديف The Art of Living ، وهي منظمة غير ربحية تشارك في إدارة الإجهاد ومبادرات الخدمة. تعمل البرامج التي صممها Gurudev على تمكين الأشخاص من خلال التقنيات والأدوات ليعيشوا حياة أعمق وأكثر سعادة.

 # صباح_الخير Si

snippet.description:
Become a part of MI One Family. Like, Comment and Subscribe and make sure to click on the notifications icon.

Watch Kieron Pollard enter the Mumbai Indians dressing after playing a crucial part in the team's successful chase against the Chennai Super Kings during the IPL 2021 in Delhi. Check out what he had to say and how the team congratulated in this post-match dressing room team reaction.

snippet.title: The Pet Peeves Song (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Our first ever MUSIC VIDEO lol !
Stay tuned for our behind the scenes video dropping next week!
► Thanks for subscribing! - http://bit.ly/SubDudePerfect

Song Writer: Ben Rogers
Vocals: Dude Perfect
Song Mixer: Aaron Kelley
Song produced at: Luminous Sound, Dallas TX
-------------------------------------------
LYRICS:
Dude Perfect -- Yas Yas – haha
Why are you talking like that?
Recording a lit video, bro – A song about Pet Peeves, brah
That’s interesting because my #1 pet peeve is people overusing bro and brah
I hear you brah… but Pet Peeves are makin my life a grind, bro
You’re actually grindin on my nerves, like right now
 
Man, listen… I’mma break it down with precision
The mission, is to expose pet peeve conditions
I’ll list em, like couples, who over-say bae
Or people goin around saying that’s cray cray
 
And I gotta be honest -- I was really hopin
You could stop eating with your mouth wide open
And try Scopin, please back up off me
Breath smellin like burnt dog poop and coffee
 
And stop these, baby-name catastrophes
Like Ransom, Melanomia and ABCDE
And I’m sick of passin these dogs that bark a lot
Why are you leaving grocery carts in a parkin lot?
 
And whether it’s dark or not, why oh why oh why oh why
Are you takin TWO parkin spots?
Cause you’re drivin nuts, like missin one foot puts
I think I’m hatin your guts, it’s simply too much

CHORUS
Pet Peeves are on my mind
Makin my life a grind
Pet Peeves are on my mind
Makin my life, my life, my life, OH
Pet Peeves are on my mind
Makin my life a grind
Pet Peeves are on my mind
A grind, a grind, a grind, a grind OH

It happens every day, why must it be this way?
Another couple throwin down excessive PDA
And what am I supposed to do? 
It always lights my fuse
When I squeeze mustard, but all I get is mustard juice
 
Dude Perfect. Listen up, it will be worth it.
I can’t stand it when pet peeves surface
Like opening a cereal bag and it explodes
Or no toilet paper over by the commode
 
Or someone breaking the code, of eatin food off my plate
They didn’t order no fries, but all of mine they ate
I can’t stand human zombies in a trance with their phone
I can’t stand human beings wearing too much cologne
 
I can’t stand close talkers, people all in my face
Or people talkin in a movie, this is such a disgrace
Or people walking round town loud talkin their phone
I wanna get up in their face and say I do not condone
 
I hate sign stealin cheaters
One-up story tellers
Constant interrupters
BO body smellers
Because you’re driving me nuts, like missin one foot puts
I think I’m hatin your guts, it’s simply too much
 
CHORUS

It happens every day, I can’t believe when I see
Someone refuse to cover their mouth when they have to sneeze
And What am I supposed to do – how am I supposed to breathe?
When someone says suppoably instead of supposedly

CHORUS
-------------------------------------------
NEXT LEVEL STUFF 
-------------------------------------------

Our first ever MUSIC VIDEO lol !
Stay tuned for our behind the scenes video dropping next week!

Song Writer: Ben Rogers
Vocals: Dude Perfect
Song Mixer: Aaron Kelley
Song produced at: Luminous Sound, Dallas TX
-------------------------------------------
LYRICS:
Dude Perfect -- Yas Yas – haha
Why are you talking like that?
Recording a lit video, bro – A song about Pet Peeves, brah
That’s interesting because my #1 pet peeve is people overusing bro and brah
I hear you brah… but Pet Peeves are makin my life a grind, bro
You’re actually grindin on my nerves, like right now
 
Man, listen… I’mma break it down with precision
The mission, is to expose pet peeve conditions
I’ll list em, like couples, who over-say bae
Or people goin around saying that’s cray cray
 
And I gotta be honest -- I was really hopin
You could stop eating with your mouth wide open
And try Scopin, please back up off me
Breath smellin like burnt dog poop and coffee
 
And stop these, baby-name catastrophes
Like Ransom, Melanomia and ABCDE
And I’m sick of passin these dogs that bark a lot
Why are you leaving grocery carts in a parkin lot?
 
And whether it’s dark or not, why oh why oh why oh why
Are you takin TWO parkin spots?
Cause you’re drivin nuts, like missin one foot puts
I think I’m hatin your guts, it’s simply too much

CHORUS
Pet Peeves are on my mind
Makin my life a grind
Pet Peeves are on my mind
Makin my life, my life, my life, OH
Pet Peeves are on my mind
Makin my life a grind
Pet Peeves are on my mind
A grind, a grind, a grind, a grind OH

It happens every day, why must it be this way?
Another couple throwin down excessive PDA
And what am I supposed to do? 
It always lights my fuse
When I squeeze mustard, but all I get is mustard juice
 
Dude Perfect. Listen up, it will be worth it.
I can’t stand it when pet peeves surface
Like opening a cereal bag and it explodes
Or no toilet paper over by the commode
 
Or someone breaking the code, of eatin food off my plate
They didn’t order no fries, but all of mine they ate
I can’t stand human zombies in a trance with their phone
I can’t stand human beings wearing too much cologne
 
I can’t stand close talkers, people all in my face
Or people talkin in a movie, this is such a disgrace
Or people walking round town loud talkin their phone
I wanna get up in their face and say I do not condone
 
I hate sign stealin cheaters
One-up story tellers
Constant interrupters
BO body smellers
Because you’re driving me nuts, like missin one foot puts
I think I’m hatin your guts, it’s simply too much
 
CHORUS

It happens every day, I can’t believe when I see
Someone refuse to cover their mouth when they have to sneeze
And What am I supposed to do – how am I supposed to breathe?
When someone says suppoably instead of supposedly

CHORUS

snippet.title: Breathe Right To Boost Immunity | Day 2 of 10 Days Breath And Meditation Journey With Gurudev
snippet.description:
Breathe Right To Boost Immunity | Day 2 of 10 Days Breath And Meditation Journey With Gurudev
Join the 10 Day Breath and Meditation Journey on http://aoliv.in/10days​​

Learn the most powerful breathing exercise in the world by doing the Online Meditation and Breath Workshop here: https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

Most people don't know that they are using only 33% of their lung capacity. This can be increased by learning yogic breathing or deep-focused breathing. On Day 2 of the Breathing and meditation challenge, we bring you powerful breathing exercises that can enhance your lung capacity for oxygen. The combination of breathing exercises and meditation will revitalize your body and relax your mind.

Optimize your oxygen capacity by learning the most powerful breathing and meditation exercise in the world, Sudarshan Kriya on the Online Meditation and Breath Workshop: 👉🏽 https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

About Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar is a world-renowned humanitarian, spiritual leader, and an ambassador of peace and human values. Through his life and work, Gurudev has inspired millions around the world with a vision of a stress-free and violence-free world.
Gurudev founded The Art of Living, a non-profit organization that is engaged in stress-management and service initiatives. The programs designed by Gurudev empower people with techniques and tools to live a deeper and blissful life.

#GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving #BreathHeals

ar.title: الحق في التنفس لتعزيز المناعة | اليوم الثاني من 10 أيام رحلة التنفس والتأمل مع جوروديف
ar.description:
الحق في التنفس لتعزيز المناعة | اليوم الثاني من 10 أيام رحلة التنفس والتأمل مع جوروديف
 انضم إلى رحلة التنفس والتأمل لمدة 10 أيام على http://aoliv.in/10days

 تعرف على أقوى تمرين للتنفس في العالم من خلال إجراء ورشة عمل التأمل والتنفس عبر الإنترنت هنا: https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

 لا يعرف معظم الناس أنهم يستخدمون 33٪ فقط من سعة الرئة لديهم. يمكن زيادة هذا عن طريق تعلم التنفس اليوغي أو التنفس العميق. في اليوم الثاني من تحدي التنفس والتأمل ، نقدم لك تمارين تنفس قوية يمكنها تعزيز قدرة رئتيك على الأكسجين. مزيج من تمارين التنفس والتأمل سوف ينشط جسمك ويريح عقلك.

 حسِّن سعة الأكسجين لديك من خلال تعلم أقوى تمرين للتنفس والتأمل في العالم ، سودارشان كريا في ورشة التأمل والتنفس عبر الإنترنت: 👉🏽 https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

 حول جوروديف سري سري رافي شانكار

 غوروديف سري سري رافي شانكار هو زعيم روحي إنساني مشهور عالميًا وسفير السلام والقيم الإنسانية. من خلال حياته وعمله ، ألهم Gurudev الملايين حول العالم برؤية لعالم خالٍ من التوتر والعنف.
 أسس جوروديف The Art of Living ، وهي منظمة غير ربحية تشارك في إدارة الإجهاد ومبادرات الخدمة. تعمل البرامج التي صممها Gurudev على تمكين الأشخاص من خلال التقنيات والأدوات ليعيشوا حياة أعمق وأكثر سعادة.

hi.title: सांस की तकलीफ बढ़ाने का अधिकार | गुरुदेव के साथ 10 दिन की सांस और ध्यान यात्रा के दिन 2
hi.description:
सांस की तकलीफ बढ़ाने का अधिकार | गुरुदेव के साथ 10 दिन की सांस और ध्यान यात्रा के दिन 2

 यहां ऑनलाइन मेडिटेशन और बर्थ वर्कशॉप कर दुनिया के सबसे शक्तिशाली सांस लेने के व्यायाम को जानें:

 ज्यादातर लोग नहीं जानते कि वे अपने फेफड़ों की क्षमता का केवल 33% उपयोग कर रहे हैं। इसे योगिक श्वास या गहरी केंद्रित श्वास सीखकर बढ़ाया जा सकता है। श्वास और ध्यान चुनौती के दिन 2 पर, हम आपको शक्तिशाली साँस लेने के व्यायाम लाते हैं जो ऑक्सीजन के लिए आपके फेफड़ों की क्षमता को बढ़ा सकते हैं। साँस लेने के व्यायाम और ध्यान का संयोजन आपके शरीर को पुनर्जीवित करेगा और आपके दिमाग को आराम देगा।

 दुनिया में सबसे शक्तिशाली श्वास और ध्यान अभ्यास सीखकर अपनी ऑक्सीजन क्षमता का अनुकूलन करें, ऑनलाइन ध्यान और सांस लेने की क्रिया पर सुदर्शन क्रिया: a https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर के बारे में

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर विश्व प्रसिद्ध मानवतावादी, आध्यात्मिक नेता और शांति और मानवीय मूल्यों के राजदूत हैं। अपने जीवन और कार्य के माध्यम से, गुरुदेव ने दुनिया भर में लाखों लोगों को एक तनाव-मुक्त और हिंसा-मुक्त दुनिया की दृष्टि से प्रेरित किया।
 गुरुदेव ने द आर्ट ऑफ लिविंग की स्थापना की, जो एक गैर-लाभकारी संगठन है जो तनाव-प्रबंधन और सेवा की पहल में लगा हुआ है। गुरुदेव द्वारा डिजाइन किए गए कार्यक्रम लोगों को तकनीकों और उपकरणों के साथ एक गहन और आनंदित जीवन जीने के लिए सशक्त बनाते हैं।

 # गुरुदेव श्रीश्री रविशंकर

 Sobre Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

 Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar é um líder espiritual humanitário de renome mundial e um embaixador da paz e dos valores humanos. Ao longo de sua vida e trabalho, Gurudev inspirou milhões ao redor do mundo com uma visão de um mundo sem estresse e sem violência.
 Gurudev fundou The Art of Living, uma organização sem fins lucrativos que está envolvida em iniciativas de gerenciamento de estresse e serviços. Os programas desenvolvidos por Gurudev capacitam as pessoas com técnicas e ferramentas para viver uma vida mais profunda e feliz.

https://youtu.be/9Db_owqWJe4

Thikasaniche maskat is a Konkani breakfast recipe. This is a very easy and simple recipe. It is made from wheat flour. It gets nice net and turns out crispy. You can also can this ghavane, or dhiradi or pole. This is a very healthy and quick recipe. It can be made from very few ingredients those are easily available in your pantry. You can try this recipe at home and drop a comment for me. Do not forget to like, share and subscribe.

Ingredients:
• 1 cup Wheat flour
• 1/4 tsp Cumin seeds
• 1/4 tsp Carom seeds / Ajwain
• Finely chopped Green chili
• 2 tsp shredded fresh Coconut
• 1/4 tsp Turmeric powder
• Salt to taste
• Water
• Finely chopped Coriander leaves
• Oil

Method:
• In a bowl take wheat flour, cumin seeds, ajwain, green chili, fresh coconut, turmeric powder, 
  salt and mix everything well together. 
• Add a little water at a time to make a little runny batter like dosa batter. 
• No lumps of wheat flour should be formed. 
• Add coriander leaves and mix well. 
• Heat up a pan on medium heat and spread oil on it. 
• Mix the batter well once transfer on the pan. 
• Spread it little and roast until lower side gets nice golden color. 
• When lower side gets nice golden color spread a little oil on upper side and flip maskat over 
  carefully. 
• When lower side also gets nice golden color, transfer the masakt into a dish. 
• Thiksaniche maskat is all ready.
• You can serve maskat with coconut chutney.

For more Such Recipes

snippet.title: Drew McIntyre's Claymore Kick On Bobby Lashley & Braun Strowman | 4th May, 2021 | WWE RAW
snippet.description:
Bobby Lashley and Braun Strowman faced each other in a Non-Title Match with Drew McIntyre on commentary. After Lashley picked up the win against Strowman with a Spear, McIntyre got up from the commentary box and flattened both Lashley and Strowman with two Claymore Kicks.
.

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 2 May 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara’s birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can’t tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

snippet.title: Popatlal का Sting Operation -Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता-Ep 3158-4th May 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/dplnk?schema=sony://asset/1000116776#utm_source=YOUTUBE&utm_medium=slate&utm_campaign=YT_traffic

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Episode 3158: Popatlal To Expose The Black Marketers
---------------------------------------------------------
Popatlal receives a call from his Informer Guddu late at night. Informer Guddu asks Popatlal to meet him in a place of isolation so he could pass on critical information. Popatlal meets him at the decided place and gets to know about the black marketing of the COVID vaccine and the only link to expose this racket is to find Michael. To know more watch the full episode.
More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: Lockdown in Punjab: Failure of Punjab Government?
snippet.description:
🔹ਕੀ ਸੂਬੇ 'ਚ ਲੱਗਣ ਜਾ ਰਿਹਾ ਮੁਕੰਮਲ ਲੌਕਡਾਊਨ ?
🔹ਪੰਜਾਬ 'ਚ ਲੱਗੇ ਲੌਕਡਾਊਨ ਤੋਂ ਲੋਕਾਂ 'ਚ ਵੱਡੀ ਨਾਰਾਜ਼ਗੀ
🔹ਲੌਕਡਾਊਨ ਤੋਂ ਬਾਅਦ ਵੀ ਲੋਕ ਸੜਕਾਂ 'ਤੇ
🔹ਇਹ ਕਿਹੋ ਜਿਹਾ ਲੌਕਡਾਊਨ ?

 Lockdown in Punjab: Failure of Punjab Government? As covid cases are increasing day by day, Punjab Government imposes strict guidelines to handle covid crisis. But in reality, these guidelines do not seem to properly impose in Punjab.

snippet.title: திடீரென எதிர் வீட்டுக்கு சென்று திக்குமுக்காட வைத்த மு.க.ஸ்டாலின்|MK Stalin| DMK
snippet.description:
கோபாலபுரத்திலுள்ள தனது தாயாரை சந்தித்து வாழ்த்துப் பெற்றார் மு.க.ஸ்டாலின்

தமிழகத்தில் திமுக ஆட்சியைக் கைப்பற்றியுள்ள நிலையில், தாயாரிடம் மு.க.ஸ்டாலின் வாழ்த்து

தாயார் வீட்டுக்கு எதிரே இருந்த குடும்ப நண்பர் வீட்டுக்குச் சென்றும் வாழ்த்துப் பெற்றுக் கொண்டார்

ஸ்டாலின் திடீர் வருகையால் எதிர் வீட்டுக்காரர்கள் மகிழ்ச்சியில் திக்குமுக்காடினர்

Sathiyam also offers news based investigative shows such as Urakka Solvoem, Kuttram Kuttramae, discussion shows such as Sathiyam Saathiyamae, Kelvi Kanaigal & Adaiyaalam, public interest shows such as Pasumarathaani, Ivar Yaar, Uzhavan & Urimai Kural, satirical shows such as Mic Mayaandi and history based shows such as Varalaattril Indru & Varalaaru Pesukirathu.
We as a company have passion to reach out to the Tamil speaking population world over with the honest and responsible presentation of news and current affairs that reflects the true spirit of journalism and reported with authenticity, clarity and definitive conviction. We believe that a decision made by individuals in the society who have access to information that is truthful and unbiased has the potential to impact and change the society at large. All the broadcasts of Sathiyam Television will express news in a manner that is true, integral, understandable and devoid of sensationalism or slander of any kind. All broadcasts of Sathiyam Television have a singular focus of arming the viewer with the truth that would empower them to make a decision by themselves. This change we believe in turn will prepare our Nation to face the reality of truth and motivate its citizens to operate based on their individual decision.

Sathiyam has also ventured into offering media based vocational education and training through its educational arm, Sathiyam Academy. Apart from these, Sathiyam runs a matrimonial service by the name MY BEST COMPANION.

We as a company have passion to reach out to the Tamil speaking population world over with the honest and responsible presentation of news and current affairs that reflects the true spirit of journalism and reported with authenticity, clarity and definitive conviction. We believe that a decision made by individuals in the society who have access to information that is truthful and unbiased has the potential to impact and change the society at large. All the broadcasts of Sathiyam Television will express news in a manner that is true, integral, understandable and devoid of sensationalism or slander of any kind. All broadcasts of Sathiyam Television have a singular focus of arming the viewer with the truth that would empower them to make a decision by themselves. This change we believe in turn will prepare our Nation to face the reality of truth and motivate its citizens to operate based on their individual decision.

Sathiyam is aiming to become a strong and competitive channel in the GEC space of Tamil Television scenario. Sathiyam’s biggest strength is its people. The channel has some of the best talent on its rolls. A clear vision backed by the best brains gives Sathiyam a clear cut edge in the crowded Tamil TV landscape.

Sathiyam has also ventured into offering media based vocational education and training through its educational arm, Sathiyam Academy. Apart from these, Sathiyam runs a matrimonial service by the name MY BEST COMPANION.

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

snippet.title: Pinjara Khubsurti Ka | पिंजरा खुबसूरती का | Episode 181 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Vishakha tries to prove to Mayura that Omkar is faking blindness by aiming a brick at him! Watch the sneak peek of the upcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #PinjaraKhubsurtiKa

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

snippet.title: Kerala Election Result 2021 : തനിക്ക് രണ്ടാം സ്ഥാനം തന്ന Poonjarലെ ജനങ്ങളോട് നന്ദി പറഞ്ഞ്  PC George
snippet.description:
തനിക്ക് രണ്ടാം സ്ഥാനം തന്ന Poonjarലെ ജനങ്ങളോട് നന്ദി പറഞ്ഞ് PC George. ഒരു വിഭാ​ഗം തന്നെ തെറ്റിദ്ധരിച്ചെന്ന് പിസി പറഞ്ഞു. കേരളത്തിലെ തെര‍ഞ്ഞെടുപ്പ് ഫലത്തിൽ പിണറായിസമാണ് കണ്ടതെന്നും അദ്ദേഹം പറഞ്ഞു.  
#PCGeorge #Poonjar 

Counting of votes began in the high-stakes Assam, West Bengal, Kerala, Tamil Nadu, and Puducherry assembly elections, overshadowed by the raging COVID pandemic. Who will win Kerala Election 2021-  LDF or UDF? Does BJP led NDA have a chance? What will happen in the turfs of Bengal, Assam, Tamil Nadu, and Puducherry? Stay tuned to News18 Kerala for a minute-to-minute update of the poll results.

snippet.title: Gaon ki yaad | गाँव की याद - Hansraj raghuwanshi
snippet.description:
भोलेनाथ सब अच्छा करेंगे 🙏

महामारी फैलने का एक ही कारण है - प्रकृति के साथ छेड़ छाड़ । जिसका भुगतान हम सब को करना पड़ रहा है। महामारी के शिकंजे में माता, पिता, भाई, बहन और छोटे छोटे बच्चे भी आ गए हैं। यह सब खबरें सुन कर ह्रदय बहुत दुखी होता है। आप सब से मेरी विनती है के आप सब अपना और अपनों का ख्याल रखें। भोले बाबा का नाम जप करते रहें और जो लोग इस सब का नाजायज़ फायदा उठा रहे हैं उनसे बचें और ऐसे मुश्किल समय में एक दूसरे के सहायक बनें।
जयशंकरमहाराज❤️

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1234 & 1235 | Recap
snippet.description:
Soumya plans to put Harman's credibility down by planting a fake arrest by two police officers. But Harman stays composed and wins the trust of the family eventually. What will be Soumya's next move?

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KvW8epq68trmgmuFgW1dWBY

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: How to Start Class 11th? The Journey of becoming an IITian & Doctor !!! ARJUNA Batch on PW App.
snippet.description:
Complete Class 11th NCERT Syllabus + JEE/NEET Preparation . 🎯

Batch Exclusive on PW APP(http://bit.ly/3ru9Agh)

🔴 Details About The Batch.

✒️ We will cover PCM/PCB for Class 11 and JEE/NEET

✒️  Complete LIVE CLASSES of each subject(Arjunaas can see recorded lecture if He/She misses the Live Class).
⚛️ JEE Lecture Plan:https://bit.ly/3sNOyci

🌀 NEET Lecture Plan:https://bit.ly/3dJ2EHA


✒️ Study Materials that will boost up your preparation. It includes complete detailed theory and level wise exercises ( Hard Copy of the study material will be delivered at your home ).

✒️ Daily Practice Problems and Detailed Video Solutions of DPP will be provided.

✒️ Special Classes after each chapter completion with NCERT Discussion and Practice Problem Sessions.

✒️ Incase you missed the live class you can see its recording any number of times.

✒️ PDF Notes of each Class .

✒️ Test after every 21 days to help students improve their problem solving skills. It includes Part Test + Full Test
🔘 JEE TEST SCHEDULE :https://bit.ly/3tMJtSU
🔘 NEET TEST SCHEDULE :https://bit.ly/3nfR8Xn


✒️ Syllabus Completion by the end of the January 2022 with topic-wise discussion of last 10 year problems of JEE/NEET

✒️ The complete course will be accessible to all the student until JEE/NEET 2023

--------------------------------------------------
🔴 OFFLINE KA FEEL!!!

•Printed Study Material for Arjuna JEE/NEET Package ( You can order on Physics Wallah App)
ClassXI-JEE Study Material Sample:
Physics:https://bit.ly/3xpgkzs
Chemistry:https://bit.ly/3sKPmOZ
Mathematics:https://bit.ly/3gO9QUX

Class XI-NEET Study Material Sample:
Physics:https://bit.ly/3aBqRO4
Chemistry:https://bit.ly/2Phozw0
Biology:https://bit.ly/3gBAm3B

1) Package contains a total of 15 books. Each subject (PCM/PCB) will be having 4 modules and one solution booklet (100% solutions of all problems).

2) Detailed and catchy theory of each chapter with illustrative examples helping students in concept building.

3) Critical topics are highlighted in the book for keeping them in the spotlight.

4) Extra key points are mentioned in the book which gives a competitive edge over other books.

5) Books consist of MCQs of different levels of difficulty to enhance problem solving techniques.

6) Detailed answers for every question for better understanding.

7) Tips and tricks for speed and skill enhancement of students.

📝For more Details, Visit PhysicsWallah App(http://bit.ly/3ru9Agh)

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 1 May 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara’s birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can’t tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

SUBSCRIBE to Sun Bangla YouTube channel - http://bit.ly/2kviBbJ

snippet.title: ऑक्सीजन और इम्युनिटी बढ़ाने का आसान तरीका |  Enhance Immunity and Oxygen Levels | Sadhguru Hindi
snippet.description:
सरल योग अभ्यास सीखें - सिंह क्रिया और साष्टांग - सद्गुरु ने यह अभ्यास, इम्युनिटी बढ़ाने और ऑक्सीजन के स्तर को बढ़ाने के लिए डिज़ाइन किए हैं।
इन अभ्यासों के नियम:

1. साष्टांग और मकरासन को खाली पेट की स्थिति में करना चाहिए।

यानि, नीचे दिए निर्देशों के अनुसार कुछ समय रूककर यह दोनों अभ्यास करें:
- भरपेट भोजन करने के बाद 4 घंटे रुकें
- फल या कुछ बिस्कुट जैसा नाश्ता करने के बाद 2.5 घंटे रुकें
- चाय, कॉफी या पानी के अलावा कुछ भी पीने के बाद 1.5 घंटे रुकें
- पानी कभी भी पीया जा सकता है। पानी पीने पर कोई रोक नहीं है।

2. गर्भवती महिलाओं को साष्टांग या मकरासन नहीं करना चाहिए। हालांकि, वे सिंह क्रिया कर सकती हैं।

English Video:

एक योगी, युगदृष्टा, मानवतावादी, सद्‌गुरु एक आधुनिक गुरु हैं, जिनको योग के प्राचीन विज्ञान पर पूर्ण अधिकार है। विश्व शांति और खुशहाली की दिशा में निरंतर काम कर रहे सद्‌गुरु के रूपांतरणकारी कार्यक्रमों से दुनिया के करोडों लोगों को एक नई दिशा मिली है। दुनिया भर में लाखों लोगों को आनंद के मार्ग में दीक्षित किया गया है। 

सद्‌गुरु एप्प डाउनलोड करें 📲
http://onelink.to/sadhguru__app

ईशा फाउंडेशन हिंदी ब्लॉग
http://isha.sadhguru.org/hindi

सद्‌गुरु का ओफ़िशिअल हिंदी फेसबुक चैनल
http://www.facebook.com/SadhguruHindi

सद्‌गुरु का ओफ़िशिअल हिंदी Telegram ग्रुप जॉइन करें 
https://t.me/joinchat/Md1ldBSkRhCIANVu80OSDA

सद्‌गुरु का नि:शुल्क ध्यान ईशा क्रिया सीखने के लिए:
http://hindi.ishakriya.com
